summary: Video. A Fox News 'Breaking News' clip shows border czar Tom Homan at a Minneapolis press conference podium describing his meeting with Minnesota leaders and referring to community safety and to ICE as a law-enforcement agency. It is cable news press conference footage with a news chyron and no music or added editing effects.
notable_text: MINNEAPOLIS LIVE; BREAKING NEWS; NOW: BORDER CZAR TOM HOMAN HOLDS PRESS CONFERENCE; FOX NEWS ALERT
